gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/199)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/199)
text: كُلُوا الْكُمَّثْرَى فَإِنَّهُ يَجْلُو الْقَلْبَ وَ يُسَكِّنُ أَوْجَاعَ الْجَوْفِ بِإِذْنِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Al Qasim Bin yahya, from his grandfather Al Hassan Bin Rashid, from Abu Baseer,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Eat the pears for it galvanises the heart and settles the interior pains by the Permission of Allah<sup>azwj</sup> the High’.
en.sarwar: 1. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from al-Qasim ibn Yahya from his grandfather al-Hassan ibn Rashid from abu Basir who has said the following: “Abu ‘ Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘You can eat pears; it brightens the heart (mind) and calms down pains by the permission of Allah.’”
